title: Alpha Advanced
body:
# Minecraft Alpha Advanced
_Minecraft was once a much simpler game. Alpha Advanced aims to smooth over the rough edges in Minecraft Alpha and provide new, but simple, content to keep the game fresh._

## Installation Instructions
Alpha Advanced is a Jarmod. It is recommended to install it using either Prism Launcher or MultiMC.

In either Prism or MultiMC, click on 'Edit Instance' on a vanilla instance, 'Add to minecraft.jar' in the 'Versions' section, then navigate to the jar file.

Alternatively, a pre-build MultiMC/Prism instance is available in the [Github Release](https://github.com/Toriiiiiiiiii/Alpha-Advanced)

## Bug Fixes
Alpha Advanced fixes a huge number of annoying and game-breaking bugs in a1.1.2_01. From the notorious negative-coordinate ore distribution bug to many crashes, Alpha Advanced provides a far smoother experience compared to the vanilla game.

## New World Types
Extending on the Normal/Winter worlds of a1.1.2_01, Alpha Advanced additionally provides Autumn and Spring world types.
![Spring World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/227ce14ef5251e1e9b40fe99ae2984fdf5928cb8.png)![Autumn World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6462552a1d0a40a5bcb882c041cdca63ac2ff4f8.png)

## Improved Armour and Tools
Alpha Advanced reworks the annoying armour system and improves tool durability, greatly increasing the suitability of the highest-end gear.

## New Blocks & Items
From Copper to Coral, Alpha Advanced provides a wider variety of blocks, without the bloat of modern Minecraft, allowing builders to add more variety without block vomit.

## And More!
With multiplayer in active development and going under testing, there has never been a better time to pick up and try Alpha Advanced!
